race.comment: MAKAMAE (5) has a handy record here on her home circuit with two wins and two placings from six spins and will be high on confidence following that last-start victory. Gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and it's hard to knock mares in form. Anticipating another big run. RUBYDOO (1) has placed two of four around this circuit and is another to get some weight off. Maps ideally for this from gate three and should be right there at the business end. AND I AM (3) shed the maiden tag over this mile journey last time out and rider Lenton sticks in the stirrups. Can go back-to-back. CHEERFUL CAT (4) has placed two of three over this track and trip and is usually thereabouts. Presents some value for the exotics. TWILIGHT STEPS (7) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.;
